violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC has completed class and is in process of scheduling exam. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings and nesting material in the rear storage room. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen near the rear storage room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025
Rodent droppings were observed in a case of cereal. Staff to dispose of cereal containers; PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the storage room shelving have an accumulation of rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the freezer gaskets have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
The following were observed in poor repair: -coving in the storage room -fin of exhaust fan. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
Debris was observed on floor in storage room. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
Ovens located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. PIC stated they are not functional. Work order has been placed and parts are on order. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The dumpster outside is located on dirt/grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2022

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2021

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in dry storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

Wood is used in the construction of ledge in the dishwasher area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024
Milk cooler door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the dry storage shelving have an accumulation of droppings. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2022

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2021

The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

Wood is used in the construction of beams and ledges in the warewahing area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2022
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of debris and rodent dropping. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer is to be cleaned and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023

Cheese was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Cheese was returned to refrigerator. Discussed working on one task at a time, and maintaining cold temperatures throughout the preparation process. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings in the water heater storage area, and possible rodent urine, as seen by UV light, in the dry storage room. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023

Strawberries were placed on the salad line and were not washed before being cut. Raw fruits and vegetables must be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants before they are cut. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the water heater storage area. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves, storage bins, and the lids of some food containers in the storage area, have suspected rodent urine as seen by UV light. Rodent droppings and food debris observed on slicer cart. Entire storage area and all contents are to be cleaned and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023

The floors in the storage areas have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris, and rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener and slicer are to be washed, rinsed and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023

Chicken strips, chicken sandwiches, cheeseburgers, and cauliflower observed held at 109-117 degrees Fahrenheit on the sandwich pass thru unit, the hot hold unit, and the steam table. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was reheated. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings on the slicer, slicer cart, shelves and plastic containers in the back storage area, on the hot water tank, and floors of the water tank & storage areas. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PCS Big Blue Bug monthly. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean on shelves below the serving line, dry storage area, and hot water tank/chemical storage room. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023
Single service observed stored on the floor in the water tank room. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves in the storage areas have an accumulation of rodent droppings, dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of the can opener, food containers on the clean storage rack, refrigerators, and freezers have an accumulation of food debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023

The floors in the kitchen and storage areas have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris, and rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023
